name: Mondi Tire Kutsan Kagit ve Ambalaj Sanayi A.S.
summary: Mondi Tire Kutsan Kagit ve Ambalaj Sanayi A.S. engages in the production and sale of corrugated cardboard box paper and scrap paper in Turkey and internationally. The company was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Mondi Tire Kutsan Kagit ve Ambalaj Sanayi A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Mondi Corrugated B.V.
